# Provisions — Sam Rahim

> Special projects for founders + operators.

## About

Provisions is a one-person studio run by Sam Rahim. It makes growth engines, custom tools, and software products for founders and operators who have a special project with no one to run it.

Sam Rahim is a full stack operator with over a decade of experience, from Disney to venture-backed startups. He now runs Provisions full-time, making custom software, AI-powered tools, and growth engines for small-to-mid-size businesses.

## What Provisions Does

- **Growth Engines**: Niche Reddit tools, converting UGC, vertical-specific products, and other novel customer acquisition tactics.
- **Custom Tools**: Dashboards, AI agents, internal apps, and automations. Custom software made for how your business actually works.
- **Interactive Marketing Materials**: Demos, one-pagers, case studies, and decks made interactive and memorable.

## Products and Work

- **PlaceCard** (getplacecard.com): Wedding planning tool for budget, guests, seating, and vendors.
- **LawnHQ** (mylawnhq.com): AI lawn care advisor for your zip code and grass type.
- **Little Reveal** (ourlittlereveal.com): The most beautiful way to share pregnancy news and updates with your inner circle.
- **Internal Agency Platform**: AI-powered content intelligence, performance analytics, and client reporting for a marketing agency.
- **Reddit Responder**: Scrapes niche-relevant subreddits, scores posts by relevance, and drafts value-add replies.

- Website: https://provisions.work

- Email: Contact via provisions.work

## Key Facts

- Location: United States
- Studio type: One-person studio (solo operator)
- Typical engagement: 1-3 weeks, $1K-$3K
- Positioning: "Every founder has a special project with no one to run it."
